stemHtml: During flight, you want to confirm your position and so request a magnetic bearing from the station. Which of the following is true if you plot a line on a chart WITHOUT correcting for variation?

options.a: You have requested QDR and plot a line on a chart WITHOUT correcting for variation.
options.b: You have requested QDM and plot a line on a chart WITHOUT correcting for variation.
options.c: You have requested QDR and plot a line on a chart corrected for variation.
options.d: You have requested QDM and plot a line on a chart corrected for variation.
